project: SWE Mentor App - Mobile Chat UI
description: Build the mobile chat experience: types, API client, useMentor hook with streaming, chat components (bubbles, input, typing indicator, suggested prompts, rate limit banner), and the MentorScreen with navigation integration.

userStories.title: Create chat types and SSE streaming API client
userStories.description: As a developer, I need TypeScript types and an API client that connects to the mentor backend via SSE streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/mobile/src/types/chat.ts with types: Message (id, conversationId, content, role, createdAt), Conversation (id, title, createdAt, updatedAt, lastMessage), ChatStreamEvent (token, conversationId), RateLimitInfo (remaining, limit, resetAt)
Create apps/mobile/src/lib/mentorApi.ts
sendMessageStream(message, conversationId?) function: POSTs to /api/mentor/chat, returns async generator that yields tokens from SSE stream
SSE parsing: reads response.body with getReader(), decodes chunks, parses 'data:' lines, yields tokens until [DONE]
getRemainingChats() function: GETs /api/mentor/chat, returns RateLimitInfo
getConversationHistory(conversationId) function: queries messages table via Supabase client
getConversations() function: queries conversations table ordered by updated_at DESC
Auth: all requests include Authorization Bearer token from supabase.auth.getSession()
sendMessageStream accepts optional signal?: AbortSignal parameter and passes it to the underlying fetch() call for cancellation support
Create RateLimitError class that extends Error with remaining and resetAt properties
Add EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL to apps/mobile/.env.example with value http://localhost:3000
Export from apps/mobile/src/types/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use the existing supabase client from apps/mobile/src/lib/supabase.ts for auth token and direct DB queries. The API base URL comes from EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL env var. For SSE parsing, use TextDecoder on ReadableStream chunks. Handle partial chunks that split across 'data:' lines by buffering incomplete lines. IMPORTANT: Do NOT wrap sendMessageStream with withRetry — retry on streaming creates duplicate conversations. Import from barrel files: import { withRetry } from '../utils' (only for non-streaming calls like getRemainingChats). See docs/plans/2025-12-20-mobile-ai-chat-roadmap.md sections 2.1 and 2.2 for reference designs.

userStories.title: Create useMentor hook with streaming support
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a React hook that manages chat state, streaming responses, and rate limiting.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/mobile/src/hooks/useMentor.ts
State: messages (Message[]), isLoading (boolean), isSending (boolean), error (Error|null), rateLimitInfo (RateLimitInfo|null), conversationId (string|null)
sendMessage(text) function: adds optimistic user message, calls sendMessageStream, builds assistant message token-by-token, handles errors by removing optimistic message
loadHistory(conversationId) function: fetches existing messages for a conversation
refreshRateLimit() function: fetches current usage via getRemainingChats()
useEffect on mount: calls refreshRateLimit()
useEffect on conversationId change: calls loadHistory() if conversationId is set
Cleanup: AbortController to cancel in-flight streams on unmount — pass controller.signal to sendMessageStream's signal parameter
All handlers wrapped in useCallback with proper dependencies
Export from apps/mobile/src/hooks/index.ts barrel
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Follow existing hook patterns in apps/mobile/src/hooks/ (useAuth, useProfile). Use logger from apps/mobile/src/utils/ for errors, not console.log. The streaming loop should update state on each token for real-time display. Use AbortController to cancel the fetch if component unmounts mid-stream. See docs/plans/2025-12-20-mobile-ai-chat-roadmap.md section 2.3 for full hook design.

userStories.title: Create chat UI components (ChatBubble, ChatInput, TypingIndicator, SuggestedPrompts, RateLimitBanner, ChatHeader)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need polished chat components following the dark theme design system.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/mobile/src/components/chat/ directory with all components
ChatBubble.tsx: user messages right-aligned with bg-primary-600 rounded-2xl, assistant messages left-aligned with bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl, max-width 80%, timestamp in text-xs text-gray-500
ChatInput.tsx: TextInput with bg-gray-800 rounded-2xl, multiline support, animated send button using react-native-reanimated (scales up when text present), disabled state when isSending
TypingIndicator.tsx: 3 animated dots with sequential delay (200ms apart) using react-native-reanimated, gray-400 color
SuggestedPrompts.tsx: horizontal ScrollView with prompt chips (bg-gray-800/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2), prompts: 'How was my week?', 'Career advice', 'Help with a blocker', 'Review my goals'
RateLimitBanner.tsx: amber/yellow warning banner with Ionicons warning icon, shows remaining count and time until reset, hidden when remaining > 5
ChatHeader.tsx: 'Mentor' title in text-xl font-bold, remaining chats badge (bg-primary-600 rounded-full px-2)
Create apps/mobile/src/components/chat/index.ts barrel export
All components use NativeWind className prop for styling
All components use Ionicons from @expo/vector-icons for icons
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Follow STYLE_GUIDE.md and apps/mobile/CLAUDE.md strictly. Dark theme: bg-gray-950 main background, bg-gray-900 card background, primary purple #8b5cf6, text-white primary text, text-gray-400 secondary. Use StyleSheet.create outside components for non-NativeWind styles. Use useCallback for handlers passed to children. Put the suggested prompt strings in apps/mobile/src/constants/ as SUGGESTED_PROMPTS constant — do NOT use magic strings inline. See docs/plans/2025-12-20-mobile-ai-chat-roadmap.md sections 3.2-3.6 for exact component specs.

userStories.title: Create MentorScreen and integrate into tab navigation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the MentorScreen wired into the tab navigator so users can access the AI mentor.
acceptanceCriteria: Create apps/mobile/src/screens/main/MentorScreen.tsx
Screen layout: SafeAreaView + KeyboardAvoidingView (behavior='padding' on iOS)
ChatHeader at top with remaining chats badge from useMentor
RateLimitBanner conditionally shown below header
FlatList with inverted={false} rendering ChatBubble components, TypingIndicator as ListFooterComponent when isSending
Empty state: centered Ionicons chatbubbles-outline icon (size 64, gray-600) + 'Start a conversation with your AI mentor' text + SuggestedPrompts component
ChatInput fixed at bottom with KeyboardAvoidingView
Auto-scroll to bottom on new messages via FlatList ref and onContentSizeChange
SuggestedPrompts shown above ChatInput when messages array is empty
Update apps/mobile/src/navigation/MainTabNavigator.tsx: add MentorTab alongside existing tabs
Update apps/mobile/src/components/CustomTabBar.tsx: add Mentor tab with chatbubbles icon (Ionicons)

Update BOTH MainTabParamList in apps/mobile/src/types/navigation.ts AND the local MainTabParamList in MainTabNavigator.tsx to add MentorTab: { conversationId?: string } — or delete the local redefinition and import the shared type
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Do NOT replace InsightsScreen — add MentorTab as a new tab. Check the existing MainTabNavigator.tsx and CustomTabBar.tsx for patterns. The tab icon should be 'chatbubbles' (filled) / 'chatbubbles-outline' (unfilled) from Ionicons. Follow existing screen patterns for SafeAreaView usage. Use the existing ProfileContext if you need user profile data. See docs/plans/2025-12-20-mobile-ai-chat-roadmap.md section 4.1 for full screen spec.
